---
title: "Trainings"
description: "Python trainings I have delivered since 2017."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

A running list of Python trainings I've delivered, grouped by year.

## 2017

### Advanced Python

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-pune-advpy/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-nov-advpython/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-advpy/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/arcesium-oct-advpython/day1.html>

### Basic Python for programmers

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-python/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-oct-python/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/vmware-nov-python/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2017/arcesium-oct-python/day1.html>

## 2018

### Basic Python for programmers

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/mit-pune-march/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-feb-python/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-jan-python/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-pune-jan-python/day1.html>

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/arcesium-basic-nov/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/arcesium-basic-oct/day5.html>

### Advanced Python

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/arcesium-advanced-oct/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-advanced-apr/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-advanced-may/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2018/vmware-practical-master-sep/>

## 2019

### Advanced Python

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/arcesium_advanced_sep/>

### Basic Python for programmers

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/arcesium_basic_jun/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/arcesium_basic_sep/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/grofers_basic_dec/>

### Basic Python – Teacher's Training

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/pccoe_basic/day1.html>

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/arcesium_basic_apr/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2019/arcesium_basic_aug/day1.html>

## 2020

### Advanced Python

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2020/arcesium_advanced_feb/day1.html>

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2020/arcesium_finop_batch1_module1/day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2020/arcesium_finop_batch2/module1-day1.html>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2020/arcesium_finop_batch3/>

## 2021

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2021/arcesium_finop_batch1/>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2021/arcesium_finop_batch2/>

### Python and ML

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2021/pccoe-python-ml/>

## 2022

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2022/arcesium_finop_batch1/>

## 2023

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2023/arcesium_finop_jan/>

## 2024

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://notes.pipal.in/2024/arcesium-python-jan-2024/>
- <https://notes.pipal.in/2024/arcesium-python-jun-2024/>

## 2025

### Basic Python FinOp

- <https://finop-25.arcesium.vikrant.dev/>

### Python Made Easy: Math & Science Edition

- <https://sciencemathedition25.training.vikrant.dev/>

### Python Foundation

- <https://pythonfoundationprofessional25.training.vikrant.dev/>
